name: codonopsis pilosula
title: codonopsis pilosula benefits
description: Codonopsis pilosula reduces stress by promoting relaxation and calmness, which enables individuals to cope more effectively with daily pressures and challenges. This benefit is crucial as excessive stress can lead to anxiety, insomnia, and a weakened immune system, ultimately affecting overall well-being and quality of life.
